channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Minnesota Lynx stun New York Liberty with 95-93 overtime win in Game 1 of the WNBA Finals
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Minnesota coach Cheryl Reeve has seen a lot in her incredible career that's included four WNBA championships. The historic rally by the Lynx to beat New York 95-93 in a wild Game 1 of the WNBA Finals ranks right up there as one of the best moments.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Jose State volleyball team with transgender player says no more future matches have been forfeited
item.description: San Jose State University has said no future opponents have informed them they plan to cancel matches, amid controversy over a transgender player on the team.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jaguars legend Maurice Jones-Drew explains how team can use London trip to 'springboard' into win streak
item.description: The Jacksonville Jaguars finally got their losing streak broken last week, but team legend Maurice Jones-Drew believes a win streak can begin in a very familiar place in London.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL great believes panic in Jets’ organization played a role in Robert Saleh’s firing
item.description: Pro Football Hall of Famer and Green Bay Packers legend LeRoy Butler says panic in the New York Jets organization led to the firing of head coach Robert Saleh.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fritz through to semifinals in Shanghai and Sabalenka to play Gauff in Wuhan
item.description: SHANGHAI (AP) — Taylor Fritz advanced to his fifth Masters semifinal with a straightforward 6-3, 6-4 victory over David Goffin of Belgium at the Shanghai Masters on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What the 49ers said after beating the Seahawks on Thursday night
item.description: "We talked about it during the week, it being a must-win and all those type of things and the gravity of the game, and to have your young guys, rookies coming in and making those type of plays to help win a game was so big.
item.dc:creator: Michael Nowels, The Mercury News

item.title: Brock Purdy throws for 3 TDs and the 49ers beat the Seahawks 36-24 to move atop division
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) — Deebo Samuel didn't hesitate when he was asked what was working for the San Francisco 49ers. “Brock Purdy,” Samuel said. Purdy threw for 255 yards and three touchdowns, and the Niners never trailed in a 36-24 victory over the Seattle Seahawks on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fry's 2-run homer, squeeze bunt lead Guardians over Tigers 5-4 and force ALDS Game 5
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Pinch-hitter David Fry had a go-ahead, two-run homer in the seventh inning, then bunted home an insurance run in the ninth to help the Cleveland Guardians force a decisive Game 5 against the Detroit Tigers in their AL Division Series with a 5-4 victory on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Wild hang on to beat Blue Jackets 3-2 in opener behind Boldy, Eriksson Ek and Gustavsson
item.description: Matt Boldy and Joel Eriksson Ek scored on a strong night for the second line, Mats Zuccarello added a power-play goal and the Minnesota Wild opened the season by beating former coach Dean Evason and the Columbus Blue Jackets 3-2.
item.dc:creator: Dave Campbell, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Gerrit Cole tosses playoff gem, shutting down Royals and sending Yankees back to ALCS with 3-1 win
item.description: Gerrit Cole held the Kansas City Royals to a single run over seven innings Thursday night, sending the New York Yankees to a 3-1 victory that put them back to the American League Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Padres vs. Dodgers: How to watch decisive Game 5 of NLDS
item.description: With the National League Division Series between the San Diego Padres and Los Angeles Dodgers tied at 2-2, it's win or go home for the Friars as they head up north for a decisive Game 5.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Benches clear in Yankees-Royals ALDS game after hard tag; New York stars wave off Kansas City player
item.description: The benches cleared during Thursday night's ALDS Game 4 between the New York Yankees and Kansas City Royals after a hard tag at second base.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Yankees' Chisholm accuses Royals' Garcia of intentionally trying to hurt teammate during ALDS win
item.description: Yankees third baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. accused the Royals’ Maikel Garcia of intentionally trying to hurt Anthony Volpe while sliding into second base during Game 4 of their tense AL Division Series that New York won 3-1 on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Adam Svensson has personal-best 60 to lead in Utah's return to PGA Tour after 61 years
item.description: IVINS, Utah (AP) — Adam Svensson made a 35-foot eagle putt he thought he had missed and closed with a birdie from the bunker for a career-best 11-under 60, giving him a two-shot lead Thursday in the Black Desert Championship as the PGA Tour returned to Utah for the first time in 61 years.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: SoFi Stadium awarded 2025, 2027 Concacaf Nations League finals
item.description: Los Angeles is set to host not one, but two more significant soccer matchups, including one next year. SoFi Stadium will be the site of the next two Concacaf Nations League Finals in 2025 and 2027, officials announced Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Utah HC beats Chicago in historic opener, 5-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was an historic day with a memorable ending. The Utah Hockey Club never trailed after getting first-period goals from Dylan Guenther and Clayton Keller and held off a late rally to beat the Chicago Blackhawks 5-2 in the season opener for both teams on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah HC players understand significance of first NHL game
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - No matter what happens this season, there will never be another first NHL game for the Utah Hockey Club It's just game 1 of 82, but the Utah HC players know how historic tonight's game against the Chicago Blackhawks at the Delta Center will be.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Taylor Swift is back to watch Travis Kelce and the Chiefs with Eras Tour soon to resume
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Taylor Swift was back at Arrowhead Stadium on Monday night to see her boyfriend, Travis Kelce, and the Kansas City Chiefs play the New Orleans Saints after the pop superstar had missed the team's previous two games on the road.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Castellanos wins Game 2 for Phillies with 9th-inning single, top Mets 7-6
item.description: Castellanos, who led the major leagues this season with four walk-off hits, tossed his helmet and was mobbed by teammates on the infield as a game that seemed to slip away one inning earlier turned into one more comeback for the NL East champions.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Aggies get run over by Boise State, 62-30
item.description: BOISE (ABC4 Sports) - Ashton Jeanty ran for 186 yards and three touchdowns on 13 first-half carries, while former American Fork High School quarterback Maddux Madsen passed for 256 yards and three TDs and No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Padres fandom in full force at first of three postseason watch parties
item.description: The Padres' quest for postseason glory continues and fans are along for the thrilling journey. Despite Saturday night's game being held in Los Angeles at Dodgers Stadium, the first of three watch parties kicked off with a packed house at Petco Park.
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Franco, Fox 5

item.title: PHOTOS: Padres and Dodgers face off in game 1 of the NLDS
item.description: The San Diego Padres are continuing their postseason journey in game one of the NLDS against the Dodgers after defeating the Braves earlier this week in the NL Wild Card Series.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Utes to play baseball at Smith's Ballpark next season
item.description: The University of Utah has partnered up with Salt Lake City and the Salt Lake Bees to have the Utes play baseball at Smith's Ballpark during the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Is the Chicago Bears run game back?
item.description: The Chicago Bears are relying on their running game and short passing game to replicate their Week 4 performance against the Carolina Panthers, as they have shifted away from a run-dominant offense under their new offensive coordinator.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
